name: Festival Shrimp and Saffron Rice
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups Cooked rice (cooked with...); cooked with...
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the diced red pepper, sliced green onions, and minced garlic in butter in a medium skillet over medium heat for 1 to 2 minutes.
2. Add the shrimp and seafood seasoning blend; cook, stirring, for an additional 3 to 4 minutes until the shrimp are opaque.
3. Stir in the cooked rice and grated Parmesan cheese; continue cooking and stirring until everything is thoroughly heated (about 2 to 3 minutes).
4. Alternatively, combine the diced red pepper, sliced green onions, minced garlic, and butter in a 1-quart microwave-safe baking dish.
5. Cover and cook on HIGH for 2 minutes.
6. Add the shrimp and seafood seasoning blend; reduce the setting to MEDIUM HIGH (70% power) and cover again.
7. Cook for an additional 3 to 4 minutes until the shrimp are opaque, stirring occasionally.
8. Stir in the cooked rice and grated Parmesan cheese; cover and cook on MEDIUM HIGH for 1 to 2 minutes until thoroughly heated.
9. Let the dish stand for 2 minutes before serving.
Each serving provides:
265 calories
24.3 g protein
3.7 g fat
31.2 g carbohydrate
493 mg sodium
175 mg cholesterol
Source: Cooking for Two or a Few
Reprinted with permission from The USA Rice Council
